title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the National Highways Authority of India Act, 1988. (2) It extends to the whole of India. (3) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 15th June, 1989, vide notification No. S.O. 451(E), dated 15th June, 1989, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
